description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa with a modern, minimalist design, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor plazas. The sofa features a combination of two main colors: a lighter gray for the majority of the seating and a darker gray for the corner and one side section, creating a visually distinct two-tone effect. The seat and back cushions are uniform, rectangular, and appear to be attached, providing a streamlined look without visible seams or tufting. The armrests are present on both ends of the L-shape, straight and at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, padded profile. The sofa is elevated on slender, black metal legs, which are evenly spaced at the corners and along the base for support. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, emphasizing a clean and contemporary aesthetic.
description: A large, L-shaped sectional sofa with two-tone gray upholstery, straight armrests, and slim black metal legs. The design is modern and minimalist, with smooth, uniform cushions and a clean, matte finish.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full L-shaped layout, two-tone color scheme, and the arrangement of seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the straight armrest, and the slim profile of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest, the transition between light and dark gray sections, and the even spacing of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the other armrest, the sectional corner, and the overall length of the sofa.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six uniform, rectangular seat cushions and six matching back cushions, all attached and arranged in a continuous sectional layout with no visible gaps or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests present at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, fully padded, and covered in the same upholstery as the rest of the sofa.
attribute_leg_design: Eight slender, black metal legs positioned at the corners and along the base, with a simple, straight style and exposed finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest with a straight profile, matching the seat in length and height, and featuring attached cushions with no visible segmentation or decorative details.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric with a matte finish and no visible patterns, stitching, or decorative detailing.
